query:
-- Workers in Bnei Brak (by city name in profile or workerLocation)
SELECT id, name, email, phone, "workerLocation", "preferredCity", "notificationPrefs"
FROM users
WHERE role = 'user'
  AND status = 'active'
  AND (
    "preferredCity" ILIKE '%בני ברק%'
    OR "workerLocation" ILIKE '%בני ברק%'
    OR "workerSearchCity" ILIKE '%בני ברק%'
  )
LIMIT 50;

    OR "workerLocation" ILIKE '%בני ברק%'
